text_original: its not a copy/paste of another app with a different colored UI from what I see so thats nice! the premium features seem great but I have trouble bringing myself to spend $50/year. $100 for lifetime is intriguing but I wonder how long the app's lifetime will be. My other main app has problems with creating/forgetting integral story lines. Havent had a chance to try here.. I would love to see a temp Pro option! watch a certain number of ads and get pro for 12-24 hours so you can try it first!
text_zh: 从我目前看到的情况来看，它并不是那种直接复制粘贴、只是换了个UI颜色的其他应用，这挺不错的！高级功能看起来很棒，但我很难下定决心每年花50美元。100美元买断终身版很让人心动，但我有些担心这个应用本身的寿命能有多长。我用的另一个主要应用在构建或遗忘完整故事线方面有些问题。还没机会在这里试试……我很希望能有一个临时专业版（Pro）的选项！比如看一定数量的广告，就能获得12到24小时的专业版体验，这样大家就可以先试用一下了！
reply_original: Thanks for loving our unique UI! We actually just upgraded our Memory Service to keep your storylines intact, so give it a try! Your idea about watching ads for temporary Pro is brilliant. GPU costs are high, but I've shared this with our product team. Feel free to share more thoughts at support@fantachat.ai. We'd love to hear from you!
reply_zh: 感谢您对我们独特UI的喜爱！实际上，我们刚刚升级了记忆服务，以保持您的故事线完整，快来试试吧！您关于通过观看广告来获取临时Pro会员的想法太棒了。虽然GPU成本很高，但我已经把这个建议反馈给我们的产品团队了。欢迎随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们分享更多想法，我们非常期待您的来信！
